name: fruit_selector
description: Select a fruit from a dropdown.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class Fruit_SelectorNode(BaseNode):
    name = "fruit_selector"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/list.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("choice", "string", widget_type="dropdown", options=['Apple', 'Banana', 'Cherry', 'Date'])
        self.add_output("selected", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        choice = inputs.get("choice", "Apple")
        await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
        return {"selected": choice}
    async def on_plug(self, port_name, is_input, other_node, other_port_name):
        # Called when a connection is established
        print(f"Connected {port_name} to {other_node.name}.{other_port_name}")
        self.log_info(f"Connected {port_name} to {other_node.name}.{other_port_name}")

    async def on_unplug(self, port_name, is_input):
        # Called when a connection is removed
        self.log_info(f"Disconnected {port_name}")

def register_node():
    return Fruit_SelectorNode
